channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Loads of litter around bin, 23rd March
item.description:
Loads of litter around a bin and it’s spilling out everywhere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Camberwell Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin over flowing and has been since Friday, 23rd March
item.description:
Litter by bin, been there since Friday

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, De Crespigny Park, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd March
item.description:
Mattress and fridge left on pavement. Left overnight as not there yesterday. Near junction of Thorntree Road and Kinveachy Gardens.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thorntree Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Malvern, 23rd March
item.description:
The Malvern Road in gerneral is full of fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Rubbish strewn, 23rd March
item.description:
Near bin, also some near other bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Franklin Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, rubbish all over pavement, 23rd March
item.description:
Lots of rubbish around public bin next to the station cafe.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linden Grove, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over flowing bin, 23rd March
item.description:
The bin is over flowing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Cutcombe Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins, 23rd March
item.description:
The bins block the pavement. They also blow open and spread litter everywhere. Having one big bin is the same problem as three small bins. They need removing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Boat Lifter Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another abandoned broken bike, 23rd March
item.description:
Has been here since Dec Right outside the school Kids climbing on to it, a bit dangerous

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dynevor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 23rd March
item.description:
This card has been left for at least 3 months unattended.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Hall Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous oxide canister, 23rd March
item.description:
Can of nitrous oxide in gutter, opposite side of street from hairdressers.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing Bins, 23rd March
item.description:
Bins by Homleigh School overflowing and now looking like a giant tip on the pavement. Extremely off putting and unsanitary. More people are fly tipping ea day. Can Hackney please clean and clean regularly. It is a constant mess.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunsmure Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking pavement, 23rd March
item.description:
Please have this removed ASAP

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nightingale Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter in Bethune, 23rd March
item.description:
Pavement all over Bethune is covered in excessive litter. The whole street looks like a tip but the especially where marks on the map. Can Hackney please clean and clean regularly. It is a constant mess. Fines should enforced and implemented.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bethune Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping + abandoned bin, 23rd March
item.description:
Normal issue - can you please put up a camera to tackle this near-daily problem?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Austral Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 cars blocking the entrance to the junction, having been left there for nearly 2 weeks., 23rd March
item.description:
The cars are taxed, however, they are obstructing the view of the bend and junction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Canada Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 23rd March
item.description:
Flytipped bags everywhere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Durning Road, West Norwood, Greater London

item.description:
Needs repairing please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12a, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London

item.description:
